stories.name: poll-persistence-and-sync
stories.title: Poll persistence layer and sync module
stories.scope: Create pollPersistence.ts (IDB CRUD for polls/votes) and pollSync.ts (serialize/parse for kinds 10, 11, 12). No UI, no context integration.

stories.name: marmot-poll-integration
stories.title: MarmotContext poll message handling
stories.scope: Add pollVersion counter and kind 10/11/12 dispatch in MarmotContext rumor handler. Clear poll data on leaveGroup. No new UI.

stories.name: poll-store-context
stories.title: PollStoreContext with create, vote, close actions
stories.scope: Create PollStoreContext mirroring ChatStoreContext. Provides polls, votes, createPoll, castVote, closePoll. Sends MLS application messages and chat announcements.

stories.name: create-poll-modal
stories.title: CreatePollModal UI component
stories.scope: Modal with title, description, options, poll type inputs. Validates and calls createPoll from PollStoreContext.

stories.name: poll-cards-and-panel
stories.title: PollCard, PollResultsCard, and PollPanel
stories.scope: Side panel with active/closed poll cards. Vote controls, close button, results display. Layout change in GroupDetailView.

stories.name: chat-poll-messages
stories.title: Chat rendering for poll announcements and results
stories.scope: GroupChat detects structured poll messages and renders PollChatAnnouncement/PollChatResults. Edge case handling for out-of-order messages.
